name: compliance source contract validator rejects a fragility_tier outside high medium low enum
command:
mkdir -p compliance/sources && printf 'sources:
  - {id: x, name: x, url: x, authoritative_publisher: x, jurisdiction: x, applicable_to: [x], identifier_scheme: x, fetch_frequency: weekly, legal_review_required: false, paywalled: false, why_authoritative: "a
b
c", fetcher: x, identifier_pattern: x, edition: 2.0, edition_date: 2024-01-01, authority_tier: 1, fragility_tier: extreme}
' > compliance/sources/internal.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry compliance/sources/internal.yaml --tier plugin 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_fragility_tier=extreme' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
